response.overview: A man is determined to have a marital partner. He consults an old hermit for advice and learns that if he takes a high dose of LSD while focusing his attention on his desire, he will be able to summon a wife. He performs the experiment by consuming LSD while focusing on a female avatar from a videogame, and successfully manifests a young corporeal woman. She is made aware of her existence as a servitor, a mind controlled victim, when she uncovers a USB flash drive in the backyard, which contains footage of her trauma-based metamorphosis.
response.title: Angel Maker
